Old Republic National Title Insurance Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gabriel Zeldin of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP telephone number 415-421-3400 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. Responses to be served by July 13, 2015. Sanctions of $750 awarded to Defendants. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
